## Checklist

- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes (ruff, shellcheck, gitleaks, markdownlint)
- [ ] PowerShell changes pass PSScriptAnalyzer
- [ ] **No secrets, real rosters, PII, or captured audio** are added (see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md))
- [ ] New data files ship a sanitized `*.example.*` template; real files are git-ignored
- [ ] Docs updated and added to `mkdocs.yml` `nav` where relevant
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) updated
